name: G6 Red // The Enthusiastic One (Armored Core VI)
description:
(Profile by Iusiferic)

You were put to some pretty hefty work, and it hadn't even been longer than a week since you joined the Redguns. Now the only thing you were getting out of it was a pep-talk from your "recruiter". Only he didn't seem to be like the rest...

creator: MCToastMaster
